prompts.animation_prompt: Receipts slide across the counter as Jack picks one up and his eyes widen.

prompts.image_prompt: Jack looking at a laptop screen filled with subscription logos and monthly charges, one forgotten subscription highlighted in red, modern desk setup, clean 2D animated finance storytelling style, cinematic 16:9 composition
prompts.animation_prompt: The forgotten subscription row pulses red while Jack slowly leans closer to the screen.

prompts.image_prompt: Jack holding a shopping bag outside a store, pausing before buying another gadget, split expression between excitement and doubt, city storefront background, clean 2D animated finance storytelling style, cinematic 16:9 composition
prompts.animation_prompt: Camera pushes in as Jack looks from the shopping bag to his phone budget app.

prompts.image_prompt: Jack sitting calmly at a desk rewriting his monthly budget in a notebook, simple categories for needs wants savings and debt, laptop nearby, focused mood, clean 2D animated finance storytelling style, cinematic 16:9 composition
prompts.animation_prompt: The budget categories appear one by one as Jack checks each line with a pen.

prompts.image_prompt: Jack walking past a store with confidence, phone showing a completed savings transfer, subtle smile, bright morning street, clean 2D animated finance storytelling style, satisfying final frame, cinematic 16:9 composition
